---
name: Feature/provider support request
about: Request an existing Sablier feature be supported on a specific provider
title: 'Add `[FEATURE]` support to the `[PROVIDER]` provider'
labels: enhancement, provider
assignees: ''

---

**Which feature?**
The Sablier feature you would like supported (link to its documentation page).

**Which provider?**
The provider that should support it (Docker, Docker Swarm, Kubernetes, Podman, Proxmox LXC).

**Use case**
Why do you need this feature on this provider?

**Provider capabilities**
If you know how the provider exposes the underlying capability (API, SDK, CLI), please describe it here — it helps scope the work.

**Additional context**
Add any other context here.
